content.problemStatement:
Task
Write a program to print odd numbers between 101010 to 202020 on separate lines:



Think of where the loop should start from, declare a `variable` **`a`** and initialise it to that value.
Use the  `while`  syntax to create a  `loop`,

Think of what condition would stop the loop when the iterator reaches its end.
Think of how to adjust the value of the iterator within each iteration. Would it be incremented or decremented? By what value should it be incremented or decremented?
constraints: All printed numbers are odd and lie in the range 101010 ≤ x ≤ 202020
content.outputFormat: Print all odd integers between 101010 and 202020 (inclusive) in ascending order, each on its own line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The sequence starts at the first odd number 101011 and increments by 2 each step. The sample shows the first five values; the full output contains every odd number up to 202019.
The last two odd numbers not exceeding 202020 are 202017 and 202019.
Repeated sample to illustrate the beginning of the output.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: 101011\n101013\n... (full list of odd numbers from 101011 to 202019)

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: 101011\n101013\n... (full list of odd numbers from 101011 to 202019)

hidden.label: uniform/edge case
hidden.expectedOutput: 101011\n101013\n... (full list of odd numbers from 101011 to 202019)

hidden.label: tricky case
hidden.expectedOutput: 101011\n101013\n... (full list of odd numbers from 101011 to 202019)

hidden.label: stress/general
hidden.expectedOutput: 101011\n101013\n... (full list of odd numbers from 101011 to 202019)

solution.approach: The smallest odd number ≥ 101010 is 101011. Starting from this value, repeatedly add 2 to obtain the next odd number until the value exceeds 202020. Use a while loop to iterate and print each number. No input is read, and the algorithm runs in O(N) time where N is the count of odd numbers in the range (≈50 505). The memory usage is O(1).
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) where N = number of odd integers between 101010 and 202020 (≈50 505).

code.Python3:
import sys

a = 101011  # first odd number >= 101010
out = []
while a <= 202019:  # last odd number <= 202020
    out.append(str(a))
    a += 2
sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))
